_comment: Build ledger for the packaged desktop exe. APP_VERSION (dev/working number) lives in index.html; each build mints a buildTag = two random words + -V<buildCount>. On the next build: increment buildCount, generate two fresh random words, set buildTag, then cargo tauri build. Mirrors the Leather Pattern Designer's workflow.

history.note: auto-update + updater signing; first signed build
v0.0.3 release (CI): controls + props panel + theme/prefs persistence + welcome screen
